name: Hamburger Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Shape into 4 patties, about 3 1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Place in square baking dish (8 x 8 x 2-inches).
4. If desired, brush each patty with additional catsup.
5. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) for 5 minutes.
6. Turn the dish one-quarter turn.
7. Microwave until done, 2 to 3 minutes.
